identity.title: VCO Phase Integrator
identity.supported_scope: pure voltage-domain event-driven transient behavioral Verilog-A

parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets phase and clock transition smoothing

properties.observable_contract: Phase state updates on the public 1 ns periodic schedule by 0.03 plus 0.09 times vctrl.
The observable phase remains in the normalized range from 0 inclusive to 1 exclusive.
Each phase wrap by one cycle toggles the voltage-coded clock between 0 V and 0.9 V.
A sustained higher vctrl produces more clock toggles over the same observation interval than a sustained lower vctrl.

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic 1 ns timer-updated state and wrapped normalized phase.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), topology assumptions, validation hooks, or extra observability ports.
